positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,

    ~low_survival_rate(colorectal_cancer)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    deadly_disease(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    mild_flu != colorectal_cancer).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~severe_cancer(X0) | deadly_disease(X0)).

    severe_cancer(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(mild_flu)).

    bile_duct_cancer != cholangiocarcinoma).

    colorectal_cancer != bile_duct_cancer).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    colorectal_cancer != cholangiocarcinoma).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    mild_flu != bile_duct_cancer).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    mild_flu != cholangiocarcinoma).

    ~deadly_disease(X0) | low_survival_rate(X0)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    low_survival_rate(bile_duct_cancer)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~cholangiocarcinoma(X0) | bile_duct_cancer(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mild_flu(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
